eligible_applicant_type: Prospective STEM educators (including those transitioning from private sector STEM careers)
project_area: STEM education (science, technology, engineering, mathematics, or computer science)
demographic_requirements: No specific demographic requirements mentioned; focuses on expanding STEM education access for all students in New Jersey, including nonpublic school students.
eligibility_summary: Public school STEM teachers, retired public school teachers, and prospective educators (including those with private sector STEM experience) are eligible to teach STEM subjects at nonpublic schools in New Jersey. The program incentivizes participation through increased compensation and flexibility, with applications submitted by nonpublic schools and public school districts having limited grounds to object.
